title: calanthe alpina var. keshabii
intro: Calanthe alpina var. keshabii, also known as Keshab's calanthe, is a rare and unique orchid species found in the Himalayan region. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its medicinal properties are believed to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Calanthe alpina var. keshabii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid and anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, Calanthe alpina var. keshabii is often used in tea or decoction form, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
